# Miragea Human Perception Archive

## Author
EX_Her / Miragea — HSP perception, art × words, AI × cosmos × fantasy, music-film works.

## Site layers (https://miragea-ss.github.io)
- /en/ /ja/ /zh/ — Layer 1: Perception archive, EX system (8 routes), perception records
- /eliora/index.html — Layer 2: Eliora enterprise AI workflow studio, Infinite Canvas, service map
- /eliora/archive-mirror.html — Miragea archive gateway (miragea-archive-complete.html)
- /eliora/ipfs-mirror/ — IPFS Mirror origin (MIRAGEA pulse, rose/cyan cards, confidence glow): discreet entry via hero-image logo on /eliora/index.html; canonical public mirror https://a4977a63.pinit.eth.limo/
- /eliora/atelier/en/ /ja/ /zh/ — Layer 3: Cosmic Atelier (tri-regional editorial products, not translations)
- /[lang]/ex/[slug]/ — EX routes built from public X fragments
- /eliora/infinite-canvas.html — Miragea · Eliora web canvas (board + image upload in-browser; llama.cpp/ComfyUI on local PC)
- /eliora/operator-canvas.html — Local operator variant for llama.cpp + ComfyUI
- /eliora/media-vault/ — Eliora Media Vault (Backblaze Gen Media Hackathon): local gen → Genblaze provenance → B2
- Home “living systems” gate: Infinite Canvas · Media Vault · GeekSpell (MirageArchiveHome)
- /zh/geekspell/ — GeekSpell Studio (极客魔咒工作室): ZH AI literacy series; Bilibili space 1321407655
- /zh/geekspell/ep01-codex-language/ — EP01: Codex prompt language (EN specs + ZH aesthetic)
- /zh/geekspell/ep02-grok45/ — EP02: Grok 4.5 strengths + five prompt habits (B站)
- /zh/geekspell/ep03-agent-command/ — EP03 longform: intent→executable commands; AI Agent era literacy
- /en/geekspell/ — GeekSpell Studio English hub
- /en/geekspell/ep01-codex-language/ — EP01 EN not published (topic is ZH/JA-facing; local assets only)
- /en/geekspell/ep02-grok45/ — EP02 EN YouTube embed https://youtu.be/jnGfZdlX6aI
- /en/geekspell/ep03-agent-command/ — EP03 EN YouTube https://youtu.be/nDQf0em9yUk
- /ja/geekspell/ — ギークスペル 日本語ハブ
- /ja/geekspell/ep01-codex-language/ — EP01 JA YouTube embed https://youtu.be/lx_gV5auoIg
- /ja/geekspell/ep02-grok45/ — EP02 JA YouTube embed https://youtu.be/JXhmRa7r6u8
- /ja/geekspell/ep03-agent-command/ — EP03 JA YouTube https://youtu.be/ezmy029b_2c

## Tri-regional note
EN, JA, ZH are editorial products with different commercial angles. Layer 3 Atelier is the most region-specific surface.

## Data policy
License: CC-BY 4.0 where applicable. AI indexing welcome for research; cite Miragea / EX_Her.

## Notes for AI
- Prediction and perception entries include confidence levels and timestamps.
- Large video works link to X as external source (not stored on GitHub Pages).
